auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Google Maps Platform API key sent with the X-Goog-Api-Key header. Create or manage it in the Google Cloud Console: https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/routes/get-api-key

actions.name: compute_route_matrix
actions.description: Compute route matrix elements for origin and destination waypoint combinations with Google Routes.

fieldMask.description: The response field mask sent as the `X-Goog-FieldMask` header.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

origins.description: The route matrix origin route matrix waypoints.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

destinations.description: The route matrix destination route matrix waypoints.

originIndex.description: The zero-based origin index for this matrix element.

destinationIndex.description: The zero-based destination index for this matrix element.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

status.description: The per-element status returned by Google Routes.

condition.description: The route condition for this matrix element.

staticDuration.description: The route static duration without traffic.

items.description: One Google Routes route matrix element.

actions.name: compute_routes
actions.description: Compute one or more routes between an origin and destination with Google Routes.

fieldMask.description: The response field mask sent as the `X-Goog-FieldMask` header.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.
A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.
A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

routes.description: The routes returned by Google Routes.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

fallbackInfo.description: Fallback information returned by Google Routes.

additionalProperties.description: A nested Google Routes API JSON property value.

geocodingResults.description: Geocoding results returned by Google Routes.
